alttext.image_of_qrcode_to_scan: Immagine di un codice QR da scansionare
confirmation.cancel_creation: Changes will be lost. Are you sure?
confirmation.change_admin_role: Questo avrà gravi ripercussioni sui permessi di questo utente. Sei sicuro?
confirmation.delete_account: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare il tuo account?
confirmation.delete_group: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare questo gruppo?
confirmation.delete_twofaccount: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
confirmation.delete_user: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare questo utente? Non è possibile annulare.
confirmation.demote_own_account: Non sarai più un amministratore. Sei sicuro?
confirmation.discard_all: Are you sure you want to discard all accounts?
confirmation.discard_duplicates: Sei sicuro di voler scartare tutti i duplicati?
confirmation.discard: Are you sure you want to discard this account?
confirmation.edit_own_account: Questo è il tuo account. Sei sicuro?
confirmation.purge_password_reset_reques: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare questo dispositivo?
confirmation.request_password_reset: Sei sicuro di voler reimpostare la password dell'utente?
confirmation.revoke_device: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare questo dispositivo?
confirmation.revoke_token: Sei sicuro di voler revocare questo token?
confirmation.toggle_sharing_setting: Are you sure you want to change the sharing setting?
confirmation.unshare: This will stop sharing this account with all users. Are you sure?
confirmation.bulk_unshare: This will stop sharing these accounts. Are you sure?
confirmation.you_will_loose_ownership: You are about to lose ownership of this account. Are you sure?
error.2fauth_has_not_a_valid_domain: 2FAuth's domain is not a valid domain
error.account_managed_by_external_provid: Account gestito da un provider esterno
error.auth_proxy_failed.legend: 2Fauth is configured to run behind an authentication proxy but your proxy does not return the expected header. Check your configuration and try again.
error.authenticator_missing_discoverable: Supporto credenziali scopribili mancante per l'autenticazione
error.browser_does_not_support_webauthn: Il tuo dispositivo non supporta webauthn. Riprova più tardi usando un browser più moderno
error.cannot_create_otp_without_secret: Impossibile creare un OTP senza un segreto
error.cannot_decipher_secret: Il segreto non può essere decifrato. Questo è causato principalmente da un set APP_KEY sbagliato nel . nv file di configurazione di 2Fauth o dati corrotti memorizzati nel database.
error.cannot_decode_detected_qrcode: Impossibile decodificare il codice QR rilevato, prova a ritagliare o affilare l'immagine
error.cannot_delete_the_only_admin: Cannot delete the only admin account
error.cannot_demote_the_only_admin: Cannot demote the only admin account
error.cannot_detect_qrcode_in_image: Impossibile rilevare un codice QR nell'immagine, prova a ritagliare l'immagine
error.data_cannot_be_refreshed_from_serv: Data cannot be refreshed from server
error.data_of_qrcode_is_not_valid_URI: I dati di questo codice QR non sono un valido OTP Auth URI. Il codice QR contiene:
error.delete_user_setting_only: Solo le impostazioni create dall'utente possono essere eliminate
error.error_during_data_fetching: 💀 Something went wrong during data fetching
error.error_during_decryption: Decifratura non riuscita, il database è ancora protetto. Questo è causato principalmente da un problema di integrità dei dati crittografati per uno o più account.
error.error_during_encryption: Cifratura non riuscita, il database rimane non protetto.
error.failed_icon_store_database_togglin: Migration of icons failed. The setting has been restored to its previous value.
error.failed_to_inject_content_script: Impossibile iniettare lo script per eseguire la scansione QR
error.failed_to_load_settings: Failed to load settings from the store
error.failed_to_retrieve_encryption_stor: Recupero dei dati dell'archivio crittografia non riuscito
error.failed_to_set_autolock_delay: Failed to set the auto-lock delay
error.field_is_required_and_valid_url: The field is required and must be a valid URL
error.invalid_or_unknown_token: Invalid or unknown personal access token
error.no_authenticator_support_specified: Nessun autenticatore supporta gli algoritmi specificati
error.no_icon_for_this_variant: No icon available in this variant
error.no_match_in_the_icon_pack: No match in the icon pack
error.no_pwd_reset_for_this_user_type: Password reset unavailable for this user
error.no_qrcode_found: No valid QR code found in the visible area of the page
error.no_valid_otp: Nessuna risorsa OTP valida in questo codice QR
error.not_a_supported_otp_type: Questo formato OTP non è attualmente supportato
error.passport_key_permissions: OAuth key permissions are invalid on the server. Please refer to the 'Upgrading to v8' guide on the 2FAuth documentation site to resolve this issue.
error.reserved_name_please_choose_someth: Reserved name, please choose something else
error.accepted_char_for_group_name: Please only use letters, numbers, dashes, underscores, spaces or single quotation marks
error.request_not_from_trusted_proxy: Request does not come from a trusted proxy
error.security_error_check_rpid: Security error: Check your WEBAUTHN_ID env var
error.all_users_sharing_scope_is_disable: All Users sharing scope is disabled
error.something_wrong_with_server: Qualcosa non va con il tuo server
error.spaces_are_ignored: Unwanted spaces will be automatically removed
error.sso_bad_provider_setup: This SSO provider is not fully setup in your .env file
error.sso_email_already_used: A user account with the same email address already exists but it does not match your external account ID. Do not use SSO if you are already registered on 2FAuth with this email.
error.this_account_is_already_shared_wit: This account is already shared with all users.
error.this_account_is_not_shared_with_al: This account is not shared with all users
error.too_many_ids: troppi ID sono stati inclusi nel parametro di query, max 100 consentiti
error.unauthorized.legend: You do not have permissions to view this resource or to perform this action
error.unsupported_migration: Data do not match any supported format
error.unsupported_with_reverseproxy: Not applicable when using an auth proxy or SSO
error.unsupported_with_sso_only: This authentication method is for administrators only. Users must log in with SSO.
error.user_deletion_failed: User account deletion failed, no data have been deleted
error.user_id_not_between_1_64: User ID was not between 1 and 64 chars
error.wrong_current_password: Password corrente errata, nulla è cambiato
field.algorithm.help: The algorithm used to secure your security codes
field.algorithm: Il numero di cifre dei codici di sicurezza generati
field.allow_pat_in_sso_only.help: Let users create personal access tokens and use them to authenticate with third party application like the 2FAuth web extension
field.apiToken.help: The Personal Access Token (PAT) to authenticate the extension to the server. You can generate one from the Settings > OAuth page of your 2FAuth user account
field.auto_close_timeout.help: Nascondi automaticamente la password sullo schermo dopo un timeout. Questo evita richieste non necessarie di nuove password se dimentichi di chiudere la vista password.
field.auto_lock_extension.help: Lock the extension automatically to prevent illegitimate access to its data
field.auto_lock.help: Log out the user automatically in case of inactivity. Has no effect when authentication is handled by a proxy and no custom logout url is specified.
field.auto_save_qrcoded_account.help: New accounts are automatically registered after scanning or uploading a QR code, no need to click a Save button
field.cache_management.help: Sometimes cache needs to be cleared, for instance after a change to environment variables or an update. You can do it from here.
field.check_for_update.help: Controlla automaticamente (una volta a settimana) e avvisa quando viene pubblicata una nuova versione di 2FAuth su Github
field.clear_search_on_copy.help: Svuota la casella di ricerca subito dopo che un codice è stato copiato negli appunti
field.close_otp_on_copy.help: Fare clic su una password generata per copiarla automaticamente nascondendola dallo schermo
field.copy_otp_on_display.help: Copia automaticamente una password generata subito dopo che appare sullo schermo. A causa delle limitazioni del browser, solo la prima password Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP) verrà copiata, non quelle rotanti
field.counter.help_lock: It is risky to edit the counter as you can desynchronize the account with the verification server of the service. Use the lock icon to enable modification, but only if you know for you are doing
field.current_password.help: Inserisci la tua password attuale per confermare che sei tu
field.default_group.help: The group to which the newly created accounts are associated
field.defaultCaptureMode.help: Default input mode used when the Direct input option is On
field.digits.help: Il numero di cifre dei codici di sicurezza generati
field.disable_all_security_devices.help: Tutti i tuoi dispositivi di sicurezza saranno rimossi. Usa questa opzione se ne hai perso uno o se la sua sicurezza è stata compromessa.
field.disable_all_security_devices: Disabilita tutti i dispositivi di sicurezza
field.disable_registration.help: Prevent new user registration. Unless overridden (see below), this affects SSO as well, so new users won't be able to sign in via SSO
field.display_mode.help: Choose whether you want accounts to be displayed as a list or as a grid
field.enable_sharing.help: Allow users to share their 2FA accounts with other users of this 2FAuth instance. When shared, 2FA accounts can be viewed and used by sharing recipients to generate OTP codes. Only the owner of an account can edit, delete, or export it, as well as view its secret or manage the sharing configuration of the account.
field.enable_all_users_sharing_scope.hel: The All Users scope lets you target all users of the 2FAuth instance. When an account is shared at this level, it is automatically shared with all users, including those created after the sharing action.

Disabling this setting will deactivate existing sharings with the All Users scope, but it will not revoke them. If you re-enable this setting later, these sharings will be active again unless sharings with specific users have been set up in the meantime.
field.enable_sso.help: Allow visitors to authenticate using an external ID via the Single Sign-On scheme
field.extCurrentPassword.help: The password currently used to unlock the extension
field.extNewPassword.help: The new password that will be used to lock this extension and encrypt sensitive data when needed
field.extPassword.help: The password that will be used to lock this extension and encrypt sensitive data when needed
field.findUserForShare.help: Partial search supported on username, email must match exactly
field.get_official_icons.help: (Try to) Get the official icon of the 2FA issuer when adding an account
field.group.help: Il gruppo al quale l'account deve essere assegnato
field.health_endpoint.help: URL you can visit to check the health of this 2FAuth instance. This URL can be used to set up a Docker HEALTHCHECK or a Kubernetes HTTPS Liveness probe.
field.hostUrl.help: The web address of the 2FAuth instance where you signed up. For example: https://2fauth.mysite.me
field.icon_collection.help: The icons collection to be queried at first when an official icon is required.
field.icon_source.help: Set whether to fetch the icons from an online logo collection or a local icon pack. Changing the following icon settings will not refresh icons that have already been fetched.
field.icon_pack.help: The icon pack to use when an official icon is required. Icon packs are made available by uploading pack directories to the 2FAuth server, ask your instance administrator for more.
field.icon_variant_strict_fetch.help: Narrow the fetch to the specified variant. If the variant is missing, 2FAuth will not try to fallback to the regular variant.
field.icon_variant.help: Some icons are available in different flavors to best suit dark or light user interfaces. Set the one you want to look for first. The regular variant will automatically be fetched as a fallback.
field.is_admin.help: Give administrator rights to the user. Administrators have permissions to manage the whole app, i.e. settings and other users, but cannot generate password for a 2FA they don't own.
field.keep_sso_registration_enabled.help: Allow new users to sign in for the first time via SSO whereas registration is disabled
field.language.help: Lingua utilizzata per tradurre l'interfaccia utente 2FAuth. Le lingue con nome sono complete, imposta quella scelta per sovrascrivere le preferenze del browser.
field.name: Nome
field.new_owner.help: The user to which the ownership of this account will be transferred.
field.notify_on_failed_login.help: Get an email each time an attempt to connect to your 2FAuth account fails
field.notify_on_new_auth_device.help: Get an email when a new device connects to your 2FAuth account for the first time
field.options.help: You can leave the following options blank if you don't know how to set them. The most commonly used values will be applied.
field.otp_generation.help: Set how and when One-Time Passwords (OTP) are displayed
field.otp_type.help: Time-based OTP or HMAC-based OTP or Steam OTP
field.otp_type: Choose the type of OTP to create
field.password_format.help: Change how the passwords are displayed by grouping digits to ease readability and memorization
field.period.help: The period of validity of the generated security codes in second
field.remember_active_group.help: Save the last group filter applied and restore it on your next visit
field.restrict_list.help: Emails in this list will be allowed to register. Separate addresses with a pipe ('{'|'}')
field.restrict_registration.help: Make registration only available to a limited range of email addresses. Both rules can be used simultaneously. This has no effect on registration via SSO.
field.restrict_rule.help: Emails matching this regular expression will be allowed to register
field.reveal_dotted_otp.help: Lascia la possibilità di rivelare temporaneamente le password oscurate
field.secret.help: La chiave utilizzata per generare i codici di sicurezza
field.show_accounts_icons.help: Show account icons in the main view
field.show_email_in_footer.help: Display the logged-in user's email in the footer instead of direct navigation links. The links are then available in a menu behind a click/tap on the email address.
field.show_in_chips.help: Display this group as a chip in the group selector on the main view. This has no effect if 'Use Chips for toggling' is disabled in user preferences.
field.show_next_otp.help: Preview the next password, i.e. the password that will replace the current password when it expires. Preferences set for the current OTP also apply to the next one (formatting, show as dot)
field.show_otp_as_dot.help: Replace generated password characters with *** to ensure confidentiality. Does not affect the copy/paste feature
field.show_quick_nav_menus.help: Add a navigation menu to the side of certain long pages so that you can scroll directly to specific sections. This feature is only available on desktop. Menus won't be visible on mobile or tablet.
field.show_virtual_chips.help: Show chips for virtual groups like the Group Less Accounts group, the Shared With/By Me group, etc...
field.sort_case_sensitive.help: Quando invocato, forza la funzione Ordina per ordinare gli account in base a maiuscolo/minuscolo
field.store_icon_to_database.help: Uploaded icons are registered in the database in addition to the file system storage, which is then used only as a cache. This makes creating a 2FAuth backup much easier, as only the database has to be backed up.
field.store_icon_to_database.help_bis: But beware, this may has some drawbacks: The database size may increase significantly if the instance hosts many large icons. It may also affect the application performance because the file system is hit more often to ensure it is synchronised with the database.
field.test_email.help: Send a test email to control your instance's email configuration. It is important to have a working configuration, otherwise users will not be able to request a reset password.
field.theme.help: Force a specific theme or apply the theme defined in your system/browser preferences
field.timezone.help: Il fuso orario è applicato a tutte le date e gli orari mostrati nell'applicazione
field.use_basic_qrcode_reader.help: Se si verificano problemi durante la cattura di codici QR consente questa opzione di passare a un lettore di codice QR più semplice ma più affidabile
field.use_basic_qrcode_reader: Usa lettore di codice QR di base
field.use_chips_to_select_group.help: Show a set of chips above the 2FA account list to allow group toggling direclty from the main view. When disabled, the name of the active group is displayed on a label that must be clicked to invoke the group selector.
field.use_encryption.help: Sensitive data, the 2FA secrets and emails, are stored encrypted in database. Be sure to backup the APP_KEY value of your .env file (or the whole file) as it serves as key encryption. There is no way to decypher encrypted data without this key.
field.use_sso_only.help: Make SSO the only available method to log in to 2FAuth. Password login and Webauthn are then disabled for regular users. Administrators are not affected by this restriction.
field.use_webauthn_only.help: Make WebAuthn the only authorized method to log into your 2FAuth account. This is the recommended setup to take advantage of the WebAuthn enhanced security.
field.use_webauthn_only.help_bis: In case of device lost, you will be able to recover your account by resetting this option and signing in using your email and password.
field.use_webauthn_only.help_ter: Attention! The Email & Password form remains available despite this option being enabled, but it will always return an 'Authentication failed' response.
field.useDirectCapture.help: Choose whether you want to be prompted to choose an input mode among those available or if you want to directly use the default input mode
field.view_default_group_on_copy.help: Always return to the default group when an OTP is copied
label.all_of_them_on_home.title: Show all passwords in the main view, without doing anything
label.alone_in_its_own_view.title: Click an account to get a password in a dedicated view
label.half.legend: Split digits into two equals groups
label.on_otp_copy: Alla copia del codice di sicurezza
message.2fauth_description: Una web app per gestire i tuoi account di autenticazione a due fattori (2FA) e generarne i rispettivi codici di sicurezza
message.2fauth_teaser: Una web app per gestire i tuoi account di autenticazione a due fattori (2FA) e generarne i rispettivi codici di sicurezza
message.account_bound_to_x_via_oauth: Questo account è associato a un account {provider} tramite OAuth
message.account_linked_to_sso_x_provider: Hai effettuato l'accesso tramite SSO utilizzando il tuo account {provider}. Le tue informazioni non possono essere modificate qui ma su {provider}.
message.add_first_account: Pick a method and add your first account
message.add_your_first_user_to_share_thi: Add the first user to share this account with
message.admin_users_legend: Gestisci gli utenti registrati nella tua istanza o creane nuovi.
message.all_users_meaning: Set to 'All users' to share this account with all other users of the 2FAuth instance. This includes both existing and future users.
message.auth_handled_by_proxy: Authentication handled by a reverse proxy, below settings are disabled.
message.bind_2fauth_to_use_extension: The perfect companion to your 2FAuth web application
message.delete_this_user_legend: L'account utente verrà eliminato così come tutti i suoi dati 2FA.
message.delete_your_account_and_reset_al: Il tuo account utente verrà eliminato insieme a tutti i dati di 2FA. Non puoi tornare indietro.
message.deleting_2fauth_account_does_not: L'eliminazione del tuo account 2FAuth non influenza in alcun modo il tuo account SSO esterno.
message.deleting_group_does_not_delete_a: L'eliminazione di un gruppo non elimina gli account
message.detect_qrcode_in_page_legend: Start detection and select the code, I'll handle the rest.
message.do_not_set_password_or_encryptio: Do NOT enable Password protection or Encryption when you export data from a 2FA app otherwise 2FAuth will not be able to decipher them.
message.double_check_new_owner: Be sure to double-check your choice before proceeding as this action cannot be undone (by you). Also, ensure you are transferring the ownership to a trusted user as they will have full control over this 2FA account.
message.email_will_be_send_to_x: The email will be send to {email}
message.enhance_security_using_webauthn: You can enhance the security of your 2FAuth account by enabling WebAuthn authentication.
message.ensure_you_open_mail_in_trusted_: Ensure you open the email on a device you fully own.
message.expected_format_for_direct_input: Expected: A list of otpauth URI, one by line
message.keep_in_mind_share_principle: Keep in mind that sharing an account does not give permission to recipient to access sensitive data of the 2FA account but only the ability to generate OTP codes.
message.firefox_popup_restriction_info: Your browser (Firefox) requires a special preference to be enabled for the extension to automatically open when you capture a QR code from a webpage.
message.i_m_lucky_legend: The 'Try my luck' button tries to get a standard icon from the selected icon collection. The simpler the Service field value, the more likely you are to get the expected icon: Do not append any extension (like '.com'), use the exact name of the service, avoid special chars.
message.import_legend_afterpart: Utilizzare la funzione Esporta di queste app per ottenere una risorsa di migrazione come un codice QR o un file JSON, quindi caricarlo qui.
message.import_legend: 2FAuth can import data from various 2FA apps.
message.invalid_reset_token: Questo token di reset non è valido.
message.is_pat_still_valid: Is your personal access token still valid?
message.is_shared_with_all_users_legend: Every user of this 2FAuth instance, both current and future, can see this account and generate passwords for it.
message.make_sure_copy_token: Assicurati di copiare il tuo token di accesso personale ora. Non sarai in grado di vederlo di nuovo!
message.manage_account_at_proxy_level: Manage the account at proxy level.
message.manage_groups_legend: Puoi creare gruppi per organizzare i tuoi account come vuoi. Tutti gli account rimangono visibili nel gruppo pseudo chiamato 'All', indipendentemente dal gruppo a cui appartengono.
message.need_to_import_qrcode_punchline: Need to import one of the visible QR codes of this page into 2FAuth?
message.ownership_can_be_transferred_leg: You can transfer the ownership of this 2FA account to another user. The new owner will have full control over it.
message.ownership_can_be_transferred_sha: Existing sharing settings of the account will not be impacted by the transfer.
If this account is currently shared with all users, you will be able to continue generating One-Time Passwords for it.
If this account is currently shared with specific users, you won't see it anymore unless the new owner shares it with you afterward.
message.need_a_security_device_to_enable: Imposta almeno un dispositivo per abilitare le seguenti opzioni
message.notifications.failed_login.conne: Here are the details of this connection attempt
message.notifications.failed_login.recom: If this was you, you can ignore this alert. If further attempts fail, you should contact the 2FAuth administrator to review security settings and take action against this attacker.
message.notifications.failed_login.resum: There has been a failed login attempt to your 2FAuth account.
message.notifications.new_device.connect: Here are the details of this connection
message.notifications.new_device.recomma: If this was you, you can ignore this alert. If you suspect any suspicious activity on your account, please change your password.
message.notifications.new_device.resume: A new device has just connected to your 2FAuth account.
message.notifications.new_device.subject: Connection to 2FAuth from a new device
message.notifications.twofaccount_owners: As this 2FA account may have been shared with other users before this ownership transfer, you should review the account's sharing settings to ensure they are still appropriate.
We wanted to let you know that :actor transferred ownership of 2FA account :twofaccount to you. You are now the owner of this 2FA account and have full control over it.
message.notifications.twofaccount_share_: You can no longer view this 2FA account or use it to generate One-Time Passwords.
We wanted to let you know that :actor has revoked sharing of 2FA account :twofaccount for all users.
We wanted to let you know that :actor has revoked your access to 2FA account :twofaccount.
message.notifications.twofaccount_shared: We wanted to let you know that :actor shared 2FA account :twofaccount with all users.
We wanted to let you know that :actor shared 2FA account :twofaccount with you.
A 2FA account has been shared with you
You can now view this 2FA account and use it to generate One-Time Passwords as long as the share is active.
message.notifications.reset_password.rea: You are receiving this email because you requested a password reset for your 2FAuth account.
message.notifications.reset_password.exp: This password reset link will expire in :count minutes.
message.notifications.reset_password.no_: If you did not request a password reset, no further action is required.
message.notifications.test_email_setting: Stai ricevendo questa email perché hai richiesto una email di prova per convalidare le impostazioni di posta elettronica della tua istanza 2FAuth.
message.otpauth_export_format_desc: otpauth URI is the most common format used to exchange 2FA data, for example in the form of a QR code when you enable 2FA on a web site. Select this if you want to switch from 2FAuth.
message.otpauth_export_format_sub: Export data as a list of otpauth URIs
message.password_login_and_webauthn_are_: Password di accesso e WebAuthn sono disabilitati.
message.password_request_expired: Esiste una richiesta di reimpostazione della password per questo utente ma è scaduta, il che significa che l'utente non ha cambiato la sua password in tempo. Questa può essere una richiesta da parte dell'utente stesso o da un amministratore.
message.possible_duplicate: An account with the exact same data already exists
message.purpose_description: This web extension is an add-on to the 2FAuth web application. It lets you access the 2FA data of your 2FAuth user account and generate OTPs directly from your browser bar.
message.purpose_requirements: You must have a 2FAuth user account and bind it to the extension in order to use it. This is done by providing the 2FAuth server address and a Personal Access Token (PAT).
message.recover_account_instructions: Per recuperare il tuo account, 2FAuth ripristina alcune impostazioni Webauthn in modo che tu possa essere in grado di accedere utilizzando la tua email e password.
message.recovery_punchline: 2FAuth will send you a recovery link to this email address. Click the link in the received email and follow the instructions.
message.registration_not_supported_visit: 2FA registraton from the extension is not supported yet. Visit your 2FAuth app to add your first 2FA.
message.resend_email_help: Use 'Resend email' to send a new password reset email to the user so he can set a new password. This will leave its current password as is and any previous request will be revoked.
message.reset_extension_description_bis: Use this option if you forgot the extension password.
message.reset_extension_description: The extension will be stripped of its current configuration and 2FAuth data. It will be available again for rebinding to a 2FAuth user account.
message.reset_password_help: Use 'Reset password' to force a password reset (this will set a temporary password) before sending a password reset email to the user so they can set a new password. Any previous request will be revoked.
message.reset_punchline: 2Fauth ha iniviato il link per il reset password al tuo indirizzo. Clicca sul link ricevuto nell'email per impostare una nuova password.
message.reset_your_password_to_delete_yo: Se hai sempre usato SSO per accedere, disconnettiti quindi utilizza la funzione di reset della password per ottenere una password in modo da poter compilare questo modulo.
message.retry_or_reset_extension: You can try to refresh (maybe it was a temporary problem) or you can reset the extension and provide a new token.
message.security_devices_legend: Dispositivi di autenticazione che puoi usare per accedere a 2FAuth, come le chiavi di sicurezza (come Yubikey) o gli smartphone con funzionalità biometriche (es. Apple FaceId/TouchId)
message.selected_users_meaning: Set to 'Specific users' to share this account with the users of your choice.
message.settings_managed_by_administrato: Some settings are being managed by your administrator
message.share_account_with_other_users: Share this 2FA account with other users of this 2FAuth instance.
message.shared_account_can_be_viewed_not: Shared accounts can be viewed and used by other users to generate OTP codes, but only the owner can edit or delete them, or view their secrets.
message.sign_in_using_email_password: You can connect using the email address {email} and the password {password}
message.sign_in_using_sso: Scegliere un provider SSO con cui effettuare l'accesso:
message.some_translation_are_missing: Mancano alcune traduzioni usando la lingua preferita del browser?
message.sso_only_form_restricted_to_admi: Gli utenti regolari devono accedere con SSO. Altri metodi sono solo per gli amministratori.
message.sso_only_x_settings_are_disabled: L'autenticazione è limitata solo a SSO, {auth_method} è disabilitato
message.stream.need_grant_permission.cli: It is usually done by clicking on a slashed camera icon in or next to the browser's address bar
message.stream.need_grant_permission.rea: 2FAuth does not have permission to access your camera
message.stream.need_grant_permission.sol: You need to grant permission to use your device camera. If you already denied and your browser do not prompt you again, please refers to the browser documentation to find out how to grant permission.
message.stream.no_cam_on_device.solution: Maybe you forgot to plug in your webcam
message.stream.not_readable.solution: Is the camera already in use? Ensure that no other app use your camera and try again
HTTPS is required for live scan. If you run 2FAuth from your computer, do not use virtual host other than localhost
Stream API is not supported in this browser
You should use a modern browser
message.submitted_data_parsed_now_accoun: The following 2FA accounts were found in the migration resource. So far none of them have been added to 2FAuth.
message.supported_formats_for_qrcode_upl: Accepted: jpg, jpeg, png, bmp, gif, svg, or webp
message.this_is_not_soft_delete: Questa non è una cancellazione morbida, non è possibile annullare.
message.this_form_does_not_affect_existi: This form does not affect existing shares of the account. To stop sharing this account with a user, you need to revoke the sharing from the sharing settings.
message.throttle: Troppi tentativi di accesso. Riprova tra {seconds} secondi.
message.token_legend: I token di accesso personale consentono a qualsiasi app di autenticarsi all'API 2Fauth. È necessario specificare il token di accesso come token Bearer nell'intestazione di autorizzazione delle richieste delle app consumer.
message.token_remains_valid: This action does not revoke the personal access token in use.
message.twofauth_export_format_desc: You should prefer this option if you need to create a backup that can be restored. This format takes care of the icons.
message.twofauth_export_format_sub: Export data using the 2FAuth json schema
message.twofauth_export_format_url: The schema definition is described here:
message.twofauth_webext_teaser: A browser extension to retrieve 2FA security codes generated from your 2FAuth server.
message.unlock_description: The extension is locked to protect its data. Enter the extension password to access your 2FAs.
message.use_buttons_to_save_or_discard: Use the available buttons to permanently save them to your 2FA collection or discard them.
message.use_security_device_to_sign_in: Preparati ad autenticarti usando uno dei dispositivi di sicurezza. Collega la tua chiave, rimuovi la mascherina o i guanti, ecc.
message.user_account_controlled_by_proxy: User account made available by an authentication proxy.
message.warning_no_icon_pack: No icon pack found on the server.
message.webauthn_uses_trusted_devices: WebAuthn allows you to use trusted devices (like Yubikeys or smartphones with biometric capabilities) to sign in quickly and more securely.
message.workaround_available: This is a simple configuration change that takes less than a minute. We've prepared a step-by-step guide to help you enable this feature.
message.you_can_also_paste: You can also Paste your clipboard
message.you_can_toggle_sharing_setting_a: You can toggle sharing setting at any time
message.you_need_an_account_to_go_furthe: You need an account to go further, please register yourself.
notification.autolock_triggered_punchlin: Blocco automatico attivato, sei stato disconnesso
notification.data_refreshed_to_reflect_s: I dati sono stati aggiornati per rispecchiare le modifiche lato server
notification.security_devices_succesfull: Dispositivi di sicurezza dell'utente revocati con successo
notification.test_email_sent: Test email sent, check your inbox
passwords.password: La password deve contenere almeno otto caratteri e corrispondere alla conferma.
passwords.sent: Ti abbiamo inviato una email con il link per il reset della password!
passwords.throttled: Per favore, attendi prima di riprovare.
passwords.token: Questo token di reset della password non è valido.
passwords.user: Non riusciamo a trovare un utente con questo indirizzo email.
tooltip.detect_qrcode_in_page: Detect QR codes in the active webpage
tooltip.generate_a_test_password: Genera una parola d'ordine di prova
tooltip.otpauth_export_format_sub: Export data as a list of otpauth URIs
tooltip.resend_email_title: Reinvia una email di reimpostazione password all'utente
tooltip.revoke_all_devices_for_user: Revoca tutti i dispositivi di sicurezza dell'utente
tooltip.show_last_month_log: Show entries from the last month
tooltip.show_one_year_log: Show entries from the last year
tooltip.show_six_months_log: Show entries from the last 6 months
tooltip.show_three_months_log: Show entries from the last 3 months
tooltip.sign_in_using_security_device: Accedi tramite un dispositivo di sicurezza
tooltip.this_account_is_shared_with_all: You share this account with all users
tooltip.this_account_is_shared_with_spec: You share this account with specific users
tooltip.twofauth_export_format_sub: Export data using the 2FAuth json schema
tooltip.unshare_selected_accounts: Revoke all shares on selected accounts
tooltip.use_qrcode: Usa un codice QR per compilare magicamente il modulo
validation.accepted_if: The :attribute must be accepted when :other is :value.
validation.after_or_equal: :attribute deve essere una data successiva o uguale al :date.
validation.after: :attribute deve essere una data successiva al :date.
validation.alpha_dash: The :attribute must only contain letters, numbers, dashes and underscores.
validation.alpha_num: The :attribute must only contain letters and numbers.
validation.ascii: The :attribute field must only contain single-byte alphanumeric characters and symbols.
validation.before_or_equal: :attribute deve essere una data precedente o uguale al :date.
validation.before: :attribute deve essere una data precedente al :date.
validation.boolean: Il campo :attribute deve essere vero o falso.
validation.can: The :attribute field contains an unauthorized value.
validation.confirmed: Il campo di conferma per :attribute non coincide.
validation.contains: The :attribute field is missing a required value.
validation.custom.email.ComplyWithEmailR: This email address does not comply with the registration policy
validation.custom.email.exists: No account found using this email.
validation.custom.email.IsValidEmailList: All emails must be valid and separated with a pipe
validation.custom.icon.image: Supported format are jpeg, png, bmp, gif, svg, or webp.
validation.custom.ids.regex: IDs must be comma separated, without trailing comma.
validation.custom.label.required: The uri must have a label.
validation.custom.qrcode.image: Supported format are jpeg, png, bmp, gif, svg, or webp.
validation.custom.secret.isBase32Encoded: The :attribute must be a base32 encoded string.
validation.custom.uri.regex: The :attribute is not a valid otpauth uri.
validation.date_equals: :attribute deve essere una data e uguale a :date.
validation.decimal: The :attribute field must have :decimal decimal places.
validation.declined_if: The :attribute must be declined when :other is :value.
validation.dimensions: Le dimensioni dell'immagine di :attribute non sono valide.
validation.doesnt_end_with: The :attribute may not end with one of the following: :values.
validation.doesnt_start_with: The :attribute may not start with one of the following: :values.
validation.ends_with: :attribute deve finire con uno dei seguenti valori: :values
validation.extensions: The :attribute field must have one of the following extensions: :values.
validation.filled: Il campo :attribute deve contenere un valore.
validation.gte.array: :attribute deve contenere un numero di elementi uguale o maggiore di :value.
validation.gte.file: The :attribute must be greater than or equal to :value kilobytes.
validation.gte.numeric: The :attribute must be greater than or equal to :value.
validation.gte.string: The :attribute must be greater than or equal to :value characters.
validation.hex_color: The :attribute field must be a valid hexadecimal color.
validation.IconPackExists: The icon pack cannot be found on the server.
validation.in_array: Il valore del campo :attribute non esiste in :other.
validation.ip: :attribute deve essere un indirizzo IP valido.
validation.ipv4: :attribute deve essere un indirizzo IPv4 valido.
validation.ipv6: :attribute deve essere un indirizzo IPv6 valido.
validation.IsValidRegex: The :attribute must be a valid regex pattern.
validation.json: :attribute deve essere una stringa JSON valida.
validation.list: The :attribute field must be a list.
validation.lte.array: :attribute deve contenere un numero di elementi minore o uguale a :value.
validation.lte.file: The :attribute must be less than or equal to :value kilobytes.
validation.lte.numeric: The :attribute must be less than or equal to :value.
validation.lte.string: The :attribute must be less than or equal to :value characters.
validation.mac_address: The :attribute must be a valid MAC address.
validation.max_digits: The :attribute must not have more than :max digits.
validation.max.array: The :attribute must not have more than :max items.
validation.max.file: The :attribute must not be greater than :max kilobytes.
validation.max.numeric: The :attribute must not be greater than :max.
validation.max.string: The :attribute must not be greater than :max characters.
validation.min_digits: The :attribute must have at least :min digits.
validation.missing_if: The :attribute field must be missing when :other is :value.
validation.missing_unless: The :attribute field must be missing unless :other is :value.
validation.missing_with_all: The :attribute field must be missing when :values are present.
validation.missing_with: The :attribute field must be missing when :values is present.
validation.multiple_of: The :attribute must be a multiple of :value.
validation.not_in: Il valore selezionato per :attribute non è valido.
validation.not_regex: Il formato di :attribute non è valido.
validation.not_current_owner: The new owner must not be the current owner.
validation.onlyCustomOtpWithUri: The uri parameter must be provided alone or only in combination with the 'custom_otp' parameter
validation.password.letters: The :attribute must contain at least one letter.
validation.password.mixed: The :attribute must contain at least one uppercase and one lowercase letter.
validation.password.numbers: The :attribute must contain at least one number.
validation.password.symbols: The :attribute must contain at least one symbol.
validation.password.uncompromised: The given :attribute has appeared in a data leak. Please choose a different :attribute.
validation.present_if: The :attribute field must be present when :other is :value.
validation.present_unless: The :attribute field must be present unless :other is :value.
validation.present_with_all: The :attribute field must be present when :values are present.
validation.present_with: The :attribute field must be present when :values is present.
validation.prohibited_if: The :attribute field is prohibited when :other is :value.
validation.prohibited_unless: The :attribute field is prohibited unless :other is in :values.
validation.prohibits: The :attribute field prohibits :other from being present.
validation.regex: Il formato del campo :attribute non è valido.
validation.required_array_keys: The :attribute field must contain entries for: :values.
validation.required_if_accepted: The :attribute field is required when :other is accepted.
validation.required_if_declined: The :attribute field is required when :other is declined.
validation.required_if: Il campo :attribute è richiesto quando :other è :value.
validation.required_unless: Il campo :attribute è richiesto a meno che :other sia in :values.
validation.required_with_all: Il campo :attribute è richiesto quando :values sono presenti.
validation.required_with: Il campo :attribute è richiesto quando :values è presente.
validation.required_without_all: Il campo :attribute è richiesto quando nessuno di :values è presente.
validation.required_without: Il campo :attribute è richiesto quando :values non è presente.
validation.single: When using :attribute it must be the only parameter in this request body
validation.starts_with: :attribute deve iniziare con uno dei seguenti: :values
validation.timezone: The :attribute must be a valid timezone.
validation.ulid: The :attribute field must be a valid ULID.
validation.url: The :attribute must be a valid URL.
